thought.text: It seems there might be an issue with the API response. Let me try a different approach using a more reliable weather service.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "python3 -c \"import requests; print(requests.get('https://api.weatherbit.io/v2.0/current/weather?key=your_api_key&city=Burbank,IL').json()['data'][0]['temp'])\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using Weatherbit API"}
